tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
move 101 before 100
set service "HTTPS"
next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # move 101 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # set service "HTTPS"
Unknown action 0

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # next
Unknown action 0

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 101
        set name "Ubuntu-to-WAN-HTTPS"
        set uuid 1dac04b8-29d0-51f1-0314-24043d4b36ef
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
        set comments "Allow only HTTPS for UbuntuComputer; default deny blocks other outbound exfiltration"
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
